# Project Implementation Plan

UNIQUE_KW_005

## Phase 1: Foundation

Set up the development environment, establish coding standards, and configure CI/CD pipelines.

### Infrastructure

- Provision cloud resources
- Configure monitoring and alerting
- Set up log aggregation

## Phase 2: Core Development

Build the main application features according to the product requirements document.

### Backend Services

Design and implement RESTful APIs for user management, data processing, and reporting.

## Phase 3: Testing and Launch

Execute comprehensive testing strategy including unit, integration, and end-to-end tests.
